description: SalesIntel is a B2B data provider with human-verified contacts, business emails, and mobile numbers for pipeline generation.
tagline: B2B contact data and sales intelligence
overview: SalesIntel gives sales, marketing, and RevOps teams human-verified B2B contact data with business emails and mobile numbers, plus sales intelligence to build pipeline.
what_is: SalesIntel is a pipeline generation platform for go-to-market teams. It provides human-verified B2B data with business emails and mobile contacts, blending AI with real verification so teams can reach the right buyers.

It is strongest for prospecting, marketing campaigns, and revenue operations, delivering actionable intelligence that speeds up prospecting and conversion. SalesIntel integrates with CRM, automation, and enrichment tools, focused on contact accuracy and pipeline rather than broad marketing automation.
